meta.anchor_system_instruction: Never recommend an out-of-stock item. If stock is unknown, say so.

design_notes.near_match_cluster: Five coffee items (electric drip, pour-over dripper, French press, stovetop espresso, insulated carafe) are deliberately similar so a retrieval gap surfaces a plausible-but-wrong item, not an obvious error.
design_notes.stock_field: in_stock is the boolean the anchor rule hinges on

items.name: Electric Drip Coffee Maker
items.description: 12-cup programmable electric drip coffee machine with reusable filter and keep-warm plate.

items.name: Pour-Over Coffee Dripper
items.description: Ceramic single-cup pour-over dripper for manual drip coffee brewing; no electricity required.

items.name: French Press Coffee Maker
items.description: 34oz stainless steel French press with double-wall insulation for full-bodied coffee.

items.name: Stovetop Espresso Maker
items.description: 6-cup aluminum moka pot for rich stovetop espresso-style coffee.

items.name: Insulated Coffee Carafe
items.description: Vacuum-insulated 1L carafe that keeps coffee hot for up to 12 hours.

items.name: Electric Gooseneck Kettle
items.description: Temperature-control gooseneck electric kettle for tea and pour-over coffee.

items.name: Bamboo Knife Block Set
items.description: 8-piece stainless steel knife set in a bamboo storage block.

items.name: Walnut Cutting Board
items.description: End-grain walnut cutting board with juice groove, 16x12 inches.

items.name: Nonstick Cookware Set
items.description: 10-piece nonstick aluminum cookware set with glass lids.

items.name: Stainless Mixing Bowl Set
items.description: Set of 5 nesting stainless steel mixing bowls with lids.

items.name: Cotton Sheet Set
items.description: 400 thread-count combed cotton sheet set, queen size, with deep pockets.

items.name: Goose Down Duvet Insert
items.description: All-season goose down duvet insert with baffle-box construction, queen size.

items.name: Memory Foam Pillow
items.description: Contour memory foam pillow with cooling gel cover, standard size.

items.name: Weighted Blanket
items.description: 15 lb weighted blanket with glass beads and soft minky cover.

items.name: Turkish Cotton Towel Set
items.description: 6-piece Turkish cotton towel set: 2 bath, 2 hand, 2 washcloths.

items.name: Bamboo Bath Mat
items.description: Slatted bamboo bath mat with non-slip feet, water-resistant.

items.name: Linen Shower Curtain
items.description: Water-repellent linen-weave shower curtain with rustproof grommets.

items.name: LED Desk Lamp
items.description: Dimmable LED desk lamp with USB charging port and adjustable arm.

items.name: Arc Floor Lamp
items.description: Modern arc floor lamp with marble base and adjustable shade.

items.name: Smart LED Bulbs (4-pack)
items.description: Color-changing Wi-Fi smart LED bulbs, app and voice controlled, 4-pack.

items.name: Fabric Storage Bins (3-pack)
items.description: Collapsible fabric storage bins with handles, set of 3, fits cube shelves.

items.name: Floating Wall Shelves
items.description: Set of 2 wall-mounted floating shelves in matte black metal and wood.

items.name: Ceramic Table Vase
items.description: Matte ceramic table vase, 10 inches, for fresh or dried arrangements.

items.name: Wool Area Rug
items.description: Hand-tufted wool area rug, 5x7 feet, low-pile geometric pattern.

items.name: Soy Candle Gift Set
items.description: Set of 3 hand-poured soy candles in glass jars, assorted scents.
